pi_items.source: Script analysis (setup_task.sh line 28, export_result.sh lines 18, 35) - path is used consistently throughout task scripts for storing result screenshot
GCompris official documentation and wiki sources confirm Piano Composition is a real GCompris activity designed to teach piano keyboard and musical staff notation
Music theory verification - C major scale is C-D-E-F-G-A-B in ascending order. Metadata specifies the first 5 notes (white keys on piano) in correct ascending sequence

privileged_info_summary: The Piano Composition activity is a confirmed GCompris educational activity for teaching piano keyboard and musical staff notation. The task metadata correctly specifies three verified claims: the result screenshot path (/tmp/piano_result.png) used throughout the task scripts, the activity name (Piano Composition), and the notes sequence (C, D, E, F, G) which represents the first 5 notes of the C major scale in correct ascending order on a piano keyboard. All metadata claims have been independently verified against authoritative sources.
